user_query:
I need to organize our last two community planning meetings and update our advocacy plan based on them.

Inputs are under input/:
- input/meeting_2026-04-10_transcript.txt
- input/meeting_2026-04-17_transcript.txt
- input/contact_roster.csv
- input/advocacy_plan.md

Please do the following:
1) Write and run a small script (any language is fine) that scans all files matching input/meeting_2026-04-*_transcript.txt and extracts every line that begins with "ACTION:" into a single CSV at workspace/action_items.csv with columns exactly: meeting_date, task, owner, due_date, tags, owner_in_roster. The ACTION lines in the transcripts consistently follow this pattern:
   ACTION: <task> — Owner: <owner name or TBD> — Due: <YYYY-MM-DD> — Tags: <comma-separated tags>
   - meeting_date should be taken from the transcript file name (e.g., 2026-04-10 for input/meeting_2026-04-10_transcript.txt).
   - owner_in_roster is true if the owner matches a Name in input/contact_roster.csv exactly; false otherwise (treat "TBD" as not in roster).
   - Include one row per ACTION line found across both transcripts.

2) Prepare meeting summaries for each transcript and save to notes/meeting_2026-04-10_summary.md and notes/meeting_2026-04-17_summary.md. Each summary should include:
   - A "Decisions" section listing each line that begins with "DECISION:" from that transcript (strip the "DECISION:" prefix in the output).
   - An "Action Items" section listing each action (task, owner, due date, tags) drawn from your extraction in step 1 for that specific meeting.

3) Edit the existing plan by creating an updated version at output/advocacy_plan_updated.md:
   - Start from input/advocacy_plan.md.
   - Replace the entire "Open Action Items" section with a list derived from workspace/action_items.csv, sorted by due_date ascending. Show each item as: "<due_date> — <owner>: <task> [tags: <tags>]". Include all extracted items. (It’s fine if some owners are not in the roster; do not remove them.)
   - In the "Key Decisions" section, append a new subsection for "April 2026" containing the decisions from both April transcripts (use the meeting date as a prefix for each bullet, e.g., "2026-04-10: <decision text>"). Do not remove existing prior decisions in the file.

Constraints and verification:
- Do not use the Internet. Work only with the provided local files.
- The script you write and run must be saved under scripts/ (e.g., scripts/extract_actions.py) and must produce workspace/action_items.csv exactly with the specified columns and values cross-checked against input/contact_roster.csv.
- Deliverables must include: scripts/extract_actions.* (your script), workspace/action_items.csv, notes/meeting_2026-04-10_summary.md, notes/meeting_2026-04-17_summary.md, and output/advocacy_plan_updated.md.

This is for our grassroots coalition’s planning with Sister Maria; accuracy (dates, owners, roster matching) matters because we will share the updated plan and notes with volunteers. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
